description.ko: 영원한 네온 비 아래 차가운 산업용 강철을 압도하는 유기적 홀로그램 형태가 어우러진 미래형 메트로폴리스의 낭만적인 테크 누아르 비전입니다.
description.en: A romantic tech-noir vision of a futuristic metropolis where organic holographic forms overwhelm cold industrial steel under a perpetual neon rain.

prompt: A cinematic vertical shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Cyber-Lotus Arteries.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are entwined with massive 3D holographic lotus vines that bloom in pulsing #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan light. Intense monsoon rain creates a kaleidoscopic distortion of light on wet metallic walkways and glass bridges. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails that cut through a dense, smoky volumetric atmosphere. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, 8k resolution, capturing the romantic and melancholic soul of a futuristic megacity.
